summary: Native Auth Bearer Token Tests - All 11 tests passed. Verified that the native app authentication flow using Bearer tokens in Authorization header works correctly.

features_verified: POST /api/auth/login returns session_token in response body
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user data (200)
GET /api/coop with Bearer token returns coop settings (200, NOT 401)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ get_current_user() in server.py correctly handles both cookie and Bearer token auth (line 793-860)
✅ login endpoint returns session_token in response body for native apps (line 1655)
✅ apiFetch() in appStore.ts correctly adds Authorization header with Bearer token
✅ setSessionToken() in authStore.ts now sets token in memory SYNCHRONOUSLY before async storage
✅ Grace period (10s) and consecutive 401 counter (3) prevent premature logout on race conditions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Native auth Bearer token flow fully tested and working. Key endpoints tested: /api/auth/login (returns session_token), /api/auth/me (works with Bearer), /api/coop (works with Bearer), /api/auth/logout. The fix involved: 1) Backend get_current_user() checks Authorization header for Bearer token, 2) Login returns session_token in response body, 3) Frontend sets token in memory synchronously before async storage, 4) Grace period prevents logout during bootstrap.
